name: ESXDosOpen
parameters: fname As String, mode As UByte
doc:
Function ESXDosOpen(fname As String, mode As UByte) As Byte

Open a file on ESXDOS (SD card).

Parameters:
    fname: filename to open
    mode: combination of FMODE flags:
        EDOS_FMODE_READ       (0x1) read access
        EDOS_FMODE_WRITE      (0x2) write access
        EDOS_FMODE_OPEN_EX   open if exists, else error
        EDOS_FMODE_OPEN_AL   open if exists, create if not
        EDOS_FMODE_CREATE_NEW create if not exists, else error
        EDOS_FMODE_CREATE_AL  create if not exists, else open and truncate

Returns:
    File stream ID (Byte). Returns -1 on error; ESXDOS error code is stored in ERR_NR (23610).

name: ESXDosClose
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ESXDosClose(handle As Byte)

Close a file stream previously opened with ESXDosOpen.

Parameters:
    handle: file stream ID to close

name: ESXDosRead
parameters: handle As Byte, buffer As UInteger, nbytes As UInteger
doc:
Function FASTCALL ESXDosRead(handle As Byte, buffer As UInteger, nbytes As UInteger) As UInteger

Read bytes from an open file into a memory buffer.

Parameters:
    handle: file handle returned by ESXDosOpen
    buffer: memory address of the destination buffer
    nbytes: number of bytes to read

Returns:
    Number of bytes effectively read. Returns -1 on error.

name: ESXDosWrite
parameters: handle As Byte, buffer As UInteger, nbytes As UInteger
doc:
Function FASTCALL ESXDosWrite(handle As Byte, buffer As UInteger, nbytes As UInteger) As UInteger

Write bytes from a memory buffer to an open file.

Parameters:
    handle: file handle returned by ESXDosOpen
    buffer: memory address of the source buffer
    nbytes: number of bytes to write

Returns:
    Number of bytes effectively written. Returns -1 on error.

name: ESXDosSeek
parameters: handle As Byte, offset As Long, position As UByte
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ESXDosSeek(handle As Byte, offset As Long, position As UByte)

Move the file pointer to a new position.

Parameters:
    handle: file handle returned by ESXDosOpen
    offset: byte offset
    position: reference point for the offset:
        SEEK_START  (0) from the beginning of the file
        SEEK_CUR    (1) from the current position (forward)
        SEEK_BKCUR  (2) from the current position (backward)

name: ESXDosGetPos
doc:
Function FASTCALL ESXDosGetPos(handle As Byte) As Long

Get the current file pointer position.

Parameters:
    handle: file handle returned by ESXDosOpen

Returns:
    Current file position as a Long.

name: ESXDosGetCwd
doc:
Function ESXDosGetCwd() As String

Get the current working directory path.

Returns:
    Current working directory name as a String.

Remarks:
    Uses a portion of the heap to build the string; the memory is freed before returning.

name: ESXDosOpenDir
doc:
Function ESXDosOpenDir(path As String) As UInteger

Open a directory for reading its entries.

Parameters:
    path: directory path to open

Returns:
    Handle (UInteger) to the opened directory, or 0 on error.

Remarks:
    Allocates a memory buffer from the heap. Call ESXDosCloseDir to free it.

name: ESXDosCloseDir
doc:
Sub ESXDosCloseDir(handle As UInteger)

Close a directory handle and release its memory buffer.

Parameters:
    handle: UInteger returned by ESXDosOpenDir

name: ESXDosReadDentry
doc:
Function FASTCALL ESXDosReadDentry(handle As UInteger) As Byte

Read the next directory entry into the handle's internal buffer.

Parameters:
    handle: UInteger returned by ESXDosOpenDir

Returns:
    0 if there are no more entries in the directory, non-zero if a new entry was retrieved.

name: ESXDosGetDentryFilename
doc:
Function ESXDosGetDentryFilename(handle As UInteger) As String

Get the filename of the last directory entry read by ESXDosReadDentry.

Parameters:
    handle: UInteger returned by ESXDosOpenDir

Returns:
    String containing the filename of the directory entry.

name: ESXDosGetDentryAttr
doc:
Function ESXDosGetDentryAttr(handle As UInteger) As UByte

Get the file attributes of the last directory entry read by ESXDosReadDentry.

Parameters:
    handle: UInteger returned by ESXDosOpenDir

Returns:
    UByte with attribute flags:
        FATTR_RDONLY  (1)  read-only
        FATTR_HIDDEN  (2)  hidden
        FATTR_SYSTEM  (4)  system
        FATTR_VOLUME  (8)  volume label
        FATTR_DIR    (16)  directory
        FATTR_ARCHIVE (32) archive

name: ESXDosGetDentryFilesize
doc:
Function FASTCALL ESXDosGetDentryFilesize(handle As UInteger) As ULong

Get the file size of the last directory entry read by ESXDosReadDentry.

Parameters:
    handle: UInteger returned by ESXDosOpenDir

Returns:
    File size as a ULong.

name: ESXDosChDir
doc:
Sub ESXDosChDir(path As String)

Change the current working directory.

Parameters:
    path: directory path to change to

name: ESXDosTellDir
doc:
Function FASTCALL ESXDosTellDir(handle As UInteger) As ULong

Return the index of the next directory entry to be retrieved by ESXDosReadDentry.

Parameters:
    handle: UInteger returned by ESXDosOpenDir

Returns:
    Directory entry index as a ULong.

name: ESXDosSeekDir
parameters: handle As UInteger, entry As ULong
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ESXDosSeekDir(handle As UInteger, entry As ULong)

Seek to a specific directory entry index.

Parameters:
    handle: UInteger returned by ESXDosOpenDir
    entry: ULong directory entry index to seek to

name: ESXDosRewindDir
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ESXDosRewindDir(handle As UInteger)

Rewind the directory to the first entry. Equivalent to ESXDosSeekDir(handle, 0).

Parameters:
    handle: UInteger returned by ESXDosOpenDir
